WHERE {
  { # get min-max range

      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .
  BIND(xsd:int(?qty_) AS ?qty)
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(?qty) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(SUM(?qty))

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?m ?name (?deptTeam / ?fullteam * 100 AS ?pct)
WHERE {

  ?m pv:name ?name .

  { # full team
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?fullteam) WHERE {
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }

  { # team in same dept
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?deptTeam) WHERE {
      ?m pv:memberOf ?dept .
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
      ?e pv:memberOf ?dept .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }
}

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (ROUND(AVG(?spst / ?sq) * 100) / 100 AS ?avgUnitCost)
WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?bom (SUM(?partSubTotal) AS ?spst) (SUM(xsd:int(?quant)) AS ?sq)
    WHERE {
      ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
        pv:hasBomPart ?part .
      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile
  BIND(?minW + (0.9 * (?maxW - ?minW)) AS ?pct90)

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)

PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (ROUND(AVG(?spst / ?sq) * 100) / 100 AS ?avgUnitCost)
WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?bom (SUM(?partSubTotal) AS ?spst) (SUM(xsd:int(?quant)) AS ?sq)
    WHERE {
      ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
        pv:hasBomPart ?part .
      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile
  BIND(?minW + (0.9 * (?maxW - ?minW)) AS ?pct90)

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)

SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Coil> .

  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm / 1000000000 AS ?volume_m3)

      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile
  BIND(?minW + (0.9 * (?maxW - ?minW)) AS ?pct90)

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?manager
       (COUNT(*) AS ?teamSize)
       (COUNT(*) AS ?sameDeptCount)
       ((COUNT(*)*1.0 / COUNT(*)) AS ?percentageSameDept)
WHERE {
  ?manager rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/Manager> .
  ?employee <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/hasManager> ?manager .
  ?manager <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/memberOf> ?managerDept .
  ?employee <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/memberOf> ?employeeDept .
  
  OPTIONAL {
    FILTER(?managerDept = ?employeeDept)
    BIND(?employee AS ?employeeSameDept)
  }
}
GROUP BY ?manager

PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?m ?name (?deptTeam / ?fullteam * 100 AS ?pct)
WHERE {

  ?m pv:name ?name .

  { # full team
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?fullteam) WHERE {
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }

  { # team in same dept
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?deptTeam) WHERE {
      ?m pv:memberOf ?dept .

SELECT ?bom (ROUND(AVG(?spst / ?sq) * 100) / 100 AS ?avgUnitCost)
WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?bom (SUM(?partSubTotal) AS ?spst) (SUM(xsd:int(?quant)) AS ?sq)
    WHERE {
      ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
        pv:hasBomPart ?part .
      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }

    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

}

SELECT ?m ?name (?deptTeam / ?fullteam * 100 AS ?pct)
WHERE {

  ?m pv:name ?name .

  { # full team
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?fullteam) WHERE {
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }

  { # team in same dept
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?deptTeam) WHERE {
      ?m pv:memberOf ?dept .
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
      ?e pv:memberOf ?dept .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }
}

2026-03-11 16:42:34.942 - INFO: Processing the following SPARQL query:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (ROUND(AVG(?spst / ?sq) * 100) / 100 AS ?avgUnitCost)
WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?bom (SUM(?partSubTotal) AS ?spst) (SUM(xsd:int(?quant)) AS ?sq)
    WHERE {
      ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
        pv:hasBomPart ?part .
      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile
  BIND(?minW + (0.9 * (?maxW - ?minW)) AS ?pct90)

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Coil> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .
  ?result pv:height_mm ?height_mm .
  ?result pv:weight_g ?weight_g .
  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm / 1000000000 AS ?volume_m3)
  BIND(?weight_g / 1000 AS ?weight_kg)

}

LIMIT 1

SELECT ?m ?name (?deptTeam / ?fullteam * 100 AS ?pct)
WHERE {

  ?m pv:name ?name .

  { # full team
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?fullteam) WHERE {
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }

  { # team in same dept
    SELECT ?m (COUNT(*) AS ?deptTeam) WHERE {
      ?m pv:memberOf ?dept .
      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .
      ?e pv:memberOf ?dept .
    } GROUP BY ?m
  }
}

2026-03-11 16:42:37.814 - INFO: Processing the following SPARQL query:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (ROUND(AVG(?spst / ?sq) * 100) / 100 AS ?avgUnitCost)
WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?bom (SUM(?partSubTotal) AS ?spst) (SUM(xsd:int(?quant)) AS ?sq)
    WHERE {
      ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
        pv:hasBomPart ?part .
      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile
  BIND(?minW + (0.9 * (?maxW - ?minW)) AS ?pct90)

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)

}

ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)

SELECT ?empl ?name ?email ?phone
WHERE {
  ?emplClass rdfs:subClassOf* pv:Employee .
  ?empl a ?emplClass ;
      pv:name ?name ;
      pv:email ?email .
  OPTIONAL { ?empl pv:phone ?phone }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { [] pv:hasManager ?empl . }
}
ORDER BY ?name

    SELECT ?bom

      ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .

  ?s a pv:Service .
  ?s pv:eligibleFor ?hw .
  ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ecc: <https://ns.eccenca.com/>
PREFIX void: <http://rdfs.org/ns/void#>
PREFIX vann: <http://purl.org/vocab/vann/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?supplier ?supplierName ?supplierCountry ?hardware ?priceAmount
WHERE { 
    {
        SELECT ?hardware ?priceAmount
        WHERE { 
            ?hardware a pv:Hardware ; 
                      pv:price ?price . 
            ?price pv:amount ?priceAmount ; 
                   pv:currency "EUR" . 
        }
        ORDER BY DESC(?priceAmount)
        OFFSET 5
        LIMIT 5
    }

    ?hardware pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .
    ?supplier pv:name ?supplierName ;
              pv:country ?country .

SELECT ?product ?compatibleProduct ?priceDiff
WHERE { 
  ?product a pv:Product ;
           pv:compatibleProduct ?compatibleProduct ;
           pv:price ?prodPrice .
  ?prodPrice pv:amount ?productPriceAmount .

  ?compatibleProduct pv:price ?compPrice .
  ?compPrice pv:amount ?compProductPriceAmount .

  BIND(abs(?productPriceAmount - ?compProductPriceAmount) AS ?priceDiff)
}

SELECT ?prod ?compatible (?prodAmount - ?compatibleAmount AS ?priceDiff)
WHERE {
  ?prodClass rdfs:subClassOf* pv:Product .
  ?prod a ?prodClass ;
    pv:compatibleProduct ?compatible .
  ?prod pv:price/pv:amount ?prodAmount ;
    pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
  ?compatible pv:price/pv:amount ?compatibleAmount ;
    pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
}

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?bomPart) AS ?numberOfParts) (SUM(?quantity) AS ?totalMaterialQuantity)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
       pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .

}

ORDER BY DESC(?totalMaterialQuantity)

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .
  BIND(xsd:int(?qty_) AS ?qty)
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(?qty) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(SUM(?qty))

SELECT ?manager ((?teamMembersInSameDepartment * 100.0) / ?totalTeamMembers AS ?percentage) WHERE {
    {
        SELECT ?manager (COUNT(?employee) AS ?totalTeamMembers) WHERE {
            ?employee a pv:Employee ;
                      pv:hasManager ?manager .
        }
        GROUP BY ?manager
    }
    {
        SELECT ?manager (COUNT(?employee) AS ?teamMembersInSameDepartment) WHERE {
            ?employee a pv:Employee ;
                      pv:hasManager ?manager ;
                      pv:memberOf ?department .
            ?manager pv:memberOf ?department .
        }
        GROUP BY ?manager
    }
}

SELECT ?m ?name (?deptTeam / ?fullteam * 100 AS ?pct)
WHERE {

  ?m pv:name ?name .

      ?e pv:hasManager ?m .

  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
       pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .

  ?hardware a pv:Hardware ;

         pv:currency "EUR" .

2026-03-11 16:42:49.725 - INFO: Processing the following SPARQL query:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (ROUND(AVG(?spst / ?sq) * 100) / 100 AS ?avgUnitCost)
WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?bom (SUM(?partSubTotal) AS ?spst) (SUM(xsd:int(?quant)) AS ?sq)
    WHERE {
      ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
        pv:hasBomPart ?part .
      ?part pv:quantity ?quant .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:amount ?amount .
      ?part pv:hasPart/pv:price/pv:currency "EUR" .
      BIND(xsd:int(?quant) * ?amount AS ?partSubTotal)
    }
    GROUP BY ?bom
  }
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?id ?name ?width
WHERE {
  { # get min-max range
    SELECT (MIN(?width) AS ?minW) (MAX(?width) AS ?maxW)
    WHERE {
      ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
        pv:width_mm ?width .
    }
  }

  # get 90. percentile
  BIND(?minW + (0.9 * (?maxW - ?minW)) AS ?pct90)

  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:id ?id ;
    pv:name ?name ;
    pv:width_mm ?width .

  FILTER(?width >= ?pct90)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)
